improvement: Add an explicit Cloudflare stack deployment path that deploys and verifies the replay-reservation Durable Object Worker before deploying the Pages research surface.
ordering_invariant: probe Cloudflare account and Pages access
deploy replay reservation Durable Object Worker

privacy_boundary: Contains public repository paths, hashes, workflow structure, and synthetic test results only. No credentials, private chat, health material, or identifying personal data are included.
